name_en: Celine Triomphe new chain shoulder bag, instantly fell in love with the runway look, love the Triomphe + chain design, black and gold is so beautiful in person! Super exquisite! New capacity is much larger than the old version, and a bit heavier, but I personally like the feeling of it resting on the shoulder for a more textured look. Anyway, absolutely love it, sisters who want it should grab it quickly! Size: 30cm
